# The Falafel Guy

> Strictly Halaal authentic Middle Eastern streatery in Sea Point, Cape Town. Not Just The Best Deal — The Real Deal.

## About

The Falafel Guy is a Halaal-certified Middle Eastern street food restaurant in Cape Town, South Africa. Born from a passion for authentic Middle Eastern flavors and a dream to bring the streets of the Middle East to Cape Town. Serving the Mother City since 2021. Every falafel is hand-rolled, every ingredient sourced with care, and every meal prepared with love.

## Cuisine

- Middle Eastern
- Mediterranean
- Halaal certified
- Specialties: falafel, shawarma, laffa wraps, hummus bowls, pita pockets

## Locations

### The Shop (Main Location)
- Address: 152 Main Road, Sea Point, Cape Town, 8005
- Phone: 021 015 0090
- Hours: Mon-Fri 9:00am-11:00pm, Sat-Sun 9:00am-11:30pm
- Online ordering available for pickup

### The Kiosk
- Address: Sea Point Pavilion, Beach Rd, Sea Point, Cape Town, 8005
- Phone: 079 026 8722
- Hours: Tue-Sun 11:00am-8:00pm, Closed Monday

- Email: hello@thefalafelguy.co.za

## Ordering

- Pickup: https://thefalafelguy.5loyalty.com/
- Uber Eats: Available for delivery in Cape Town
- Catering: Available for corporate events, private parties, weddings, and community gatherings
